mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_report (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, #{description}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_report
AND status = #{status}

SELECT id, reporter_id AS reporterId, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, reason, description, status, handler_id AS handlerId, handle_note AS handleNote, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM content_report WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE content_report SET status = #{status}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handle_note = #{handleNote}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_report WHERE status = 0
